outcome_narration.description: What both players are told happened, given the resolved actions and any dice results provided to you.

flags_set.description: Free-text world-state flags other systems can key off later, e.g. 'third_chalice_prepared'.

description.description: What both players now know about this NPC publicly. Do not include GM-only agenda/leverage details from hidden_state.json here -- only what's fair for both characters to now be aware of.

npcs_revealed.description: Use when a hidden_state.json hidden_npc becomes known to the players this turn (e.g. found, named, or otherwise surfaced in the fiction). Moves them into public_state.json's known_npcs list.

triggers_fired.description: IDs of hidden_state.json triggers that fired this turn, if any. GM only reveals what the trigger's effect specifies, not the raw truth field verbatim unless the fiction calls for full revelation.

gm_private_notes.description: Never shown to players. Running GM read on tension, pending consequences, promises made.
